problem_text_cn:
黑体空腔热辐射视为光子气，频率$
u$的光子能量$h
u$、质量$h
u/c^2$，数密度$n_
u$，能量密度$u_
u=n_
u h
u$，总能量密度$u=\Sigma u_
u$。1.（a）证明热平衡时$p=u/3$；（b）用开尔文表述证明$u$与腔壁材料、体积无关且$u\propto T^4$；（c）导出光子气绝热过程$p-V$方程。2.（a）证明光子速度$x$分量概率分布$f(v_x)=1/(2c)$（$-c\leq v_x\leq c$），否则为0；（b）证明腔壁小孔的能流密度$J=cu/4$，即斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律$J\propto T^4$。
problem_text_en:
Thermal radiation in a blackbody cavity is regarded as photon gas. The energy of a photon with frequency $
u$ is $h
u$, mass is $h
u/c^2$, number density is $n_
u$, energy density $u_
u=n_
u h
u$, and total energy density $u=\Sigma u_
u$. 1. (a) Prove that $p=u/3$ at thermal equilibrium; (b) Using Kelvin's statement, prove that $u$ is independent of cavity wall material and volume, and $u\propto T^4$; (c) Derive the adiabatic process $p-V$ equation of photon gas. 2. (a) Prove the probability distribution of the x-component of photon velocity $f(v_x)=1/(2c)$（$-c\leq v_x\leq c$）, otherwise 0; (b) Prove the energy flux density of the cavity wall aperture $J=cu/4$, i.e., Stefan-Boltzmann law $J\propto T^4$.
problem_solution_cn:
（1）光子气压强与能量密度关系及绝热方程：
- （a）仿理想气体压强推导，$p_
u=u_
u/3$，总压强$p=\Sigma p_
u=u/3$；
- （b）假设$u$与材料/体积相关将违背开尔文表述，结合热力学公式$(\partial U/\partial V)_T=T(\partial p/\partial T)_V-p$，得$du/u=4dT/T$，积分得$u\propto T^4$；
- （c）绝热过程$dU+pdV=0$，$U=uV=3pV$，代入得$3Vdp+4pdV=0$，积分得$pV^{4/3}=常量$。
（2）速度分布与能流密度：
- （a）速度空间球面等概率分布，球带面积与总表面积比为概率，推导得$f(v_x)=1/(2c)$（$-c\leq v_x\leq c$）；
- （b）单位时间碰撞单位截面的光子数为$\int_0^c n_
u v_x f(v_x)dv_x=n_
u c/4$，能流密度$J=\Sigma(n_
u h
u c/4)=cu/4$，结合$u\propto T^4$得$J\propto T^4$。
problem_solution_en:
（1）Relationship between photon gas pressure and energy density and adiabatic equation：
- (a) Following the derivation of ideal gas pressure, $p_
u=u_
u/3$, total pressure $p=\Sigma p_
u=u/3$；
- (b) Assuming $u$ is related to material/volume would violate Kelvin's statement. Combining the thermodynamic formula $(\partial U/\partial V)_T=T(\partial p/\partial T)_V-p$, we get $du/u=4dT/T$, integrating gives $u\propto T^4$；
- (c) Adiabatic process $dU+pdV=0$, $U=uV=3pV$, substituting gives $3Vdp+4pdV=0$, integrating gives $pV^{4/3}=constant$。
（2）Velocity distribution and energy flux density：
- (a) Isotropic probability distribution on the spherical surface in velocity space, the ratio of the area of the spherical band to the total surface area is the probability, deriving $f(v_x)=1/(2c)$（$-c\leq v_x\leq c$）；
- (b) The number of photons colliding with unit cross-section per unit time is $\int_0^c n_
u v_x f(v_x)dv_x=n_
u c/4$, energy flux density $J=\Sigma(n_
u h
u c/4)=cu/4$, combining $u\propto T^4$ gives $J\propto T^4$。
